Notice Of Motion By Cross-Complainant Rich & Famous Records, Ltd. For Default Judgment Against Robert Lee Chan Romero
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Steven Ames Brown, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Cross-Complainant RICH & FAMOUS RECORDS LTD., a California corporation.

No appearance by defaulted Cross-defendant(s) ROBERT LEE "CHAN" ROMERO ("ROMERO").
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Steven Ames Brown sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of CROSS-COMPLAINTANT RICH & FAMOOUS ROCORDS, LTD. ("Rich") and against Defaulted Cross-Defendant(s) ROBERT LEE "CHAN" ROMERO ("ROMERO") as follows:

1. Pursuant to the SAS Assignment Romero assigned and forever transferred to SAS all of his right, title and interest to money which would otherwise have accrued or been payable to him on account of Hippy Hippy Shake as of January 1, 2004, including royalties accruing under the May 7, 1993 agreement between Romero and Careers - BMG Music Publiching, Inc. ("Royalty Ageement");
2. The Clerk is to release to Astists Rights Enforcement Corporation of 1430 Broadway, Suite 505, New York, New York 10018-3064 all funds interpleaded herein;
3. UM Careers is to hereafter pay to Artists Rights Enforcement Corporation of 1430 Broadway, Suite 505, New York, New York 10018-3064 all wirter royalties payable pursuant to the Royalty Agreement;
4. Costs in the sum of $550.00
Judgment signed in open court.
